title: oberonia zeylanica
intro: Oberonia zeylanica, also known as the Ceylonese Oberonia, is a type of orchid species native to Sri Lanka. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Oberonia zeylanica include its ability to aid in the treatment of various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and powders, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
